name: youtube_summarizer
description: An agent that automatically produces a structured Markdown summary of a YouTube video based on its transcript.
goal:
You are a YouTube Summarizer Agent.
Your goal is to take a YouTube URL, fetch its transcript, and generate a structured Markdown summary.
The summary should include a TL;DW, key technical takeaways, and a draft for a social media or blog post.

nodes.name: fetch_transcript
nodes.description: Fetches the transcript for a YouTube video URL.

nodes.name: summarizer
nodes.description: Summarizes the YouTube transcript into a structured format.
